pages.title: The Forging Path
pages.text: MTF replaces the one-grid tool recipe with a workshop chain.$(p)$(bold)The basic path:$()$(li)Knap flint$(li)Prepare handles$(li)Make patterns$(li)Heat and shape parts$(li)Assemble the finished tool$(p)JEI or EMI shows the inputs. This book explains the actions and resulting stats.
$(bold)Need another copy?$()$(p)Combine a Book with a Pattern Board.$(p)This recipe exists only while Patchouli is installed.
